claim: The Currier A/B split reflects a genuine linguistic difference between two distinct languages or dialects.
evidence_for: Currier A/B split has significant differences in vocabulary and entropy levels
evidence_against: No clear evidence of language shift or dialectical variation
test: Compute the similarity between word lists for Currier A and B

tests_run.test: compute the similarity between word lists for currier a and b
tests_run.details: Language A: entropy=3.8321, 3513 unique/11022 total words. Language B: entropy=3.8611, 5089 unique/23766 total words. Entropy difference: 0.0290. Vocabulary density difference: 0.1046.
